title: campium virens
intro: Campium virens, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading herbaceous perennial plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and protect against infections. The health benefits of Campium virens include its potential to improve respiratory health, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Campium virens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, or used topically as a treatment for skin irritations and wounds.
